meaning: adj.(意大利生理学家、医生)马尔皮基的
examples: The gonads open near the base of the abdomen and the excretory organs are usually Malpighian tubules.
The results indicate that the pathogen occurs in the midgut, fat bodies, malpighian tubules and nerve cells of the host.
Malassezia can breakdown lipid like esterase, and result in morphological changes of malpighian cell and cell apoptosis, these are all their main etiological factors.
